testcase.name: deveBloquearAcessoDashboardParaEstoquista
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Status expected:<403> but was:<200> at com.studiomuda.estoque.config.SecurityConfigTest.deveBloquearAcessoDashboardParaEstoquista(SecurityConfigTest.java:41)
testcase.system-out:
MockHttpServletRequest: HTTP Method = GET Request URI = /dashboard Parameters = {} Headers = [] Body = null Session Attrs = {SPRING_SECURITY_CONTEXT=SecurityContextImpl [Authentication=UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken [Principal=org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.User [Username=user, Password=[PROTECTED], Enabled=true, AccountNonExpired=true, credentialsNonExpired=true, AccountNonLocked=true, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_ESTOQUISTA]], Credentials=[PROTECTED], Authenticated=true, Details=null, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_ESTOQUISTA]]]} Handler: Type = com.studiomuda.estoque.controller.DashboardController Method = com.studiomuda.estoque.controller.DashboardController#dashboard(Model) Async: Async started = false Async result = null Resolved Exception: Type = null ModelAndView: View name = dashboard View = null Model = null FlashMap: Attributes = null MockHttpServletResponse: Status = 200 Error message = null Headers = [Content-Language:"en", Content-Type:"text/html;charset=UTF-8", X-Content-Type-Options:"nosniff", X-XSS-Protection:"1; mode=block", Cache-Control:"no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate", Pragma:"no-cache", Expires:"0", X-Frame-Options:"DENY"] Content type = text/html;charset=UTF-8 Body = Sistema de Gestão - Studio Muda | Paisagismo & Plantas Preservadas

testcase.name: deveBloquearAcessoCuponsParaAuxiliar

error.message: Request processing failed; nested exception is org.thymeleaf.exceptions.TemplateInputException: An error happened during template parsing (template: "class path resource [templates/erro.html]")

testcase.error: org.springframework.web.util.NestedServletException: Request processing failed; nested exception is org.thymeleaf.exceptions.TemplateInputException: An error happened during template parsing (template: "class path resource [templates/erro.html]") at com.studiomuda.estoque.config.SecurityConfigTest.deveBloquearAcessoCuponsParaAuxiliar(SecurityConfigTest.java:47) Caused by: org.thymeleaf.exceptions.TemplateInputException: An error happened during template parsing (template: "class path resource [templates/erro.html]") at com.studiomuda.estoque.config.SecurityConfigTest.deveBloquearAcessoCuponsParaAuxiliar(SecurityConfigTest.java:47) Caused by: org.attoparser.ParseException: Error resolving fragment: "${content}": template or fragment could not be resolved (template: "layout" - line 202, col 14) at com.studiomuda.estoque.config.SecurityConfigTest.deveBloquearAcessoCuponsParaAuxiliar(SecurityConfigTest.java:47) Caused by: org.thymeleaf.exceptions.TemplateInputException: Error resolving fragment: "${content}": template or fragment could not be resolved (template: "layout" - line 202, col 14) at com.studiomuda.estoque.config.SecurityConfigTest.deveBloquearAcessoCuponsParaAuxiliar(SecurityConfigTest.java:47)
